data.title: SC6 calibration validation: ticket-clarity-check.sh against real tickets
data.description:
Run ticket-clarity-check.sh against real closed tickets to validate the scoring heuristic per SC6.

## Validation Steps
1. Query .claude/scripts/dso ticket list --status=closed for recent closed tickets with descriptions >=200 chars (target: 20 tickets)
2. Run ticket-clarity-check.sh <id> for each ticket
3. Assert: at least 15 of 20 well-formed tickets (>=200 char descriptions) score >=5
4. Assert: no ticket with description <100 chars scores >=5
5. Record calibration results in a ticket comment on the epic

## Corrective Action
If calibration fails, adjust clarity_check.pass_threshold in dso-config.conf. If threshold is adjusted, re-run Task 1 tests (test-ticket-clarity-check.sh) to confirm they still pass GREEN with the new threshold.

## E2E Rationale
Sprint E2E testing (running /dso:sprint <story-id> end-to-end) is deferred to the skill eval framework (promptfoo). This task validates only the clarity script calibration, not the full sprint routing.

## TDD
This IS a behavioral validation task. The test is the calibration run itself.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Calibration run completed against >=10 real closed tickets
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket list --status=closed 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; tickets=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(f'{len(tickets)} closed tickets available')"
- [ ] Results recorded as epic comment
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 0d66-ceb6 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); assert any('calibration' in c.get('body','').lower() for c in d.get('comments',[]))"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
